decks.notes: The key idea of this combo deck is to ramp up quickly using Eldrazi Temple, Urza's Saga, and Boseiju, Who Endures, while generating value from creature sacrifices with Glaring Fleshraker and Blade of the Bloodchief. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Kozilek's Command, before closing out the game with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER. The inclusion of artifact tutors like Vexing Bauble and Springleaf Drum allows for consistent combo pieces to be found, giving the deck a strong synergy and multiple win conditions.

The key concept of this UrzaTron control deck is to assemble the Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine to generate massive amounts of mana and cast powerful Eldrazi threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Devourer of Destiny. The deck also utilizes cards like Ugin, Karn, and Thought-Knot Seer to control the board and disrupt opponent's strategies. Additionally, cards like Expedition Map and Mind Stone help ramp up and fix the mana base while Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere provide further disruption. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with high-powered threats and control elements.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Amulet of Vigor and bounce lands like Simic Growth Chamber to play Primeval Titan early. The goal is to then search for lands like Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle or The Mycosynth Gardens with Primeval Titan's ability and use cards like Scapeshift to deal large amounts of damage to the opponent. The deck also includes toolbox lands like Tolaria West and Boseiju, Who Endures for additional utility and protection. The combination of land ramp and land destruction makes for a powerful combo strategy.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful combo with Broodscale Bloodchief by utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and build up counters on Blade of the Bloodchief. The deck also includes cards like Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings to help find key pieces of the combo quickly. Emrakul, the Promised End provides a powerful finisher while Kozilek's Command and Unholy Heat help control the opponent's board. The inclusion of Eldrazi Temple and Boseiju, Who Endures ensures that the deck can consistently execute its game plan effectively.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck combines efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Solitude to control the battlefield. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide additional support and buffs for the creatures. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize, utilizing a mix of creature-based aggression and burn damage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays, backed up by powerful removal spells and utility cards. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm for removal and disruption. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support for the aggro strategy, with cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Static Prison offering control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base is designed for consistency and speed, with a mix of various lands to ensure the deck can reliably hit its early drops.

This Merfolk deck focuses on countering opponents' spells and disrupting their game plan while maintaining card advantage and tempo. By efficiently using counterspells like Cryptic Command, Force of Negation, and Counterspell alongside disruptive cards like Stern Scolding and Disrupting Shoal, the deck aims to control the game and protect its board presence. The key strength lies in the synergy between the Merfolk creatures and the disruptive spells, creating a versatile and aggressive playstyle that can quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victories.

The deck focuses on controlling the board and manipulating the opponent's resources while generating card advantage through various spells and abilities. It utilizes powerful creatures like Stoneforge Mystic and Solitude alongside versatile removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Consign to Memory. Teferi, Time Raveler helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan while Ephemerate and Counterspell provide additional protection. The deck also includes synergies with cards like Quantum Riddler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to further enhance its control and midrange capabilities. Ultimately, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure victory through superior resource management.

This deck focuses on assembling UrzaTron to generate large amounts of mana in order to control the board with powerful Eldrazi creatures and planeswalkers. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Chalice of the Void while setting up a win condition with cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its large threats and efficient mana production, making it difficult for the opponent to mount a comeback.

This Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on aggressively playing artifacts and using synergies between them to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Key cards such as Mox Opal, Urza's Saga, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch allow for quick mana ramp and recurring artifact value. Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives provide interaction and removal options, while cards like Tormod's Crypt and Claws of Gix disrupt graveyard strategies. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption, utilizing artifacts to their fullest potential.

This deck focuses on utilizing UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana and play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Devourer of Destiny. It also includes cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to control the board and disrupt your opponent's game plan. The deck aims to establish a dominant board presence while also having access to versatile spells like Dismember and Kozilek's Command to deal with threats. Additionally, Karn's Sylex and All Is Dust provide additional board wipe options in case of emergencies.

The core strategy of this deck revolves around generating mana quickly and efficiently through spells like Manamorphose, Pyretic Ritual, and Ruby Medallion, in order to cast high-impact spells like Past in Flames and Grapeshot for massive damage. Ral, Monsoon Mage and Hex Magic provide additional support and control elements, while cards like Wish and Valakut Awakening offer flexibility and potential card advantage. The deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently to overwhelm the opponent and win the game before they have a chance to react.

This deck aims to quickly ramp up mana and combo off with Broodscale Bloodchief, using cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to control the board. The deck also utilizes Grove of the Burnwillows and Ugin's Labyrinth to maintain advantage. The main win condition is to generate a massive amount of mana and either overwhelm the opponent with large creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End or buffed creatures with Blade of the Bloodchief. The deck also has some disruption with cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Soul-Guide Lantern to control the opponent's resources.

This deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive board presence using creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, supported by powerful spells such as Galvanic Discharge and Voice of Victory. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Mana Tithe and Static Prison to control the game and protect your creatures. With a mix of versatile creatures and removal spells, this Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently, utilizing its aggressive nature to secure victory in the early game.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is heavily centered around disruption and control elements. With a variety of counterspells, hand disruption spells, and removal, the deck aims to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy and preventing them from assembling a board presence. The deck also includes some powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been depleted. Additionally, the deck has some card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Cling to Dust to help maintain consistency and keep the opponent on the back foot.

The deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Urza's Power Plant, and Urza's Mine) to generate a large amount of mana in the mid to late game. This mana is used to play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Thought-Knot Seer, as well as control cards like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon. The deck also utilizes control elements like Karn, the Great Creator and Chalice of the Void to disrupt opponents and maintain board control. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and control elements.
